calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-27-2014 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-25-2014 Reset To May-27-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840
Petitioner Lizeth K. Esquivel Zamora; mother of minor present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication on file.
Court ordered matter continued to May 27, 2014 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514. Court ordered Petitioner to submit a declaration and proposed Order sealing the Petition and all documents filed for this Petition. Court granted Petitioner's request that all contact information be removed from the notice that is required to be given to the other parent for the minor's name change. Court ordered todays proceedings sealed and confidential until further notice of the court.
